title: PvP Pack | Arlunez Official Pack
description: Arlunez Official Pack, a purple styled PvP pack, which includes many useful and exclusive PvP features!
body:
## **_💜PvP Pack | Arlunez Official Pack💜_**

**_Arlunez Official Pack:_**
## **Features**

🏹 Colored Bow & Crossbow Stages!

🗡️ Slightly shorter Swords!

✨ Custom Enchant-Glint!

🧪 Unobtrusive Particles!

✅ Unobtrusive Totem Pop(only pop)!

🎃 Transparent Pumpkin Overlay!

🎣 Transparent Fishing Rod Bobbers!

🔥 Low Fire!

🛡️ Low Shield!

💥 Custom Crit Particles!

💜 Custom Hearts!

🕸️ Custom Cobwebs!

🧩 Smaller PvP Items!

💧 More Clear Water!

🛠️ ...and more!

## **_Versions_**

All versions from 1.21 to the latest are supported.
